description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Scheduled Task Credentials - You can now add specific credentials to run a scheduled task. You can set different credentials per each task.
Bug Fixes
Section titled “Bug Fixes”
- Account Status in Scheduled Reports - Exported reports (CSV, Excel, PDF) now correctly show Enabled / Disabled instead of Yes / No for the Account Status column
